news.headline: DRC struggling to contain Ebola outbreak as cases spread

news.headline: Will the latest Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda spread further?
news.summary: The World Health Organization declares the epidemic a global health emergency.

news.headline: China will buy at least US$17 billion of US farm goods annually, White House says
news.summary:
China has agreed to buy at least US$17 billion in US agricultural products annually through 2028, the White House said on Sunday.
The commitment resulted from the summit between US President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week and will be in addition to soybean purchase commitmen

news.headline: PM Shehbaz thanks Qatari PM for 'strong endorsement, support' of Pakistan-led peace efforts
news.summary:
<p>Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif held a phone call with his Qatari counterpart on Sunday and thanked the leadership of Qatar for its “strong endorsement and support of Pakistan-led peace efforts”.</p>
<p>According to a statement shared by PM’s spokesperson for foreign media Mosharr
